steps.title: Identify the sign and points on the line
steps.content: The line goes up from left to right, so the slope is positive. This eliminates the negative choices A ($-2.27$) and B ($-0.44$). Reading from the scatterplot, the line passes through approximately $(0, 0.3)$ and $(5, 2.5)$.

steps.title: Calculate the slope using rise over run
